description: RMIT Neo Culture Tech - Software Manager
detail: RMIT Neo Culture Tech is a community fueled by the passion for technology and innovations. Our club offers not only a playground for tech-enthusiasts but also a unique learning experience for all students.

description: RMIT Student Ambassador Team - Coordinator of Group 5
detail: Core team member involved in planning, coordinating, and delivering major events at RMIT University.
Passionate engineering student with a strong interest in social activities, hackathons, and technology research.
